summary: Backend Refactor Phase 4 - LEADS ROUTES MIGRATION COMPLETE. All 30 lead endpoints tested and passing. Lead routes successfully migrated from server.py to routes/leads.py with business logic in services/lead_service.py. Total: 30/30 leads tests + 28/28 strangler regression tests + 26/26 comparison sheets tests = 84 tests all passing.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/leads.py: Clean migration of all 26 lead endpoints with proper auth (require_role for rm/admin)
services/lead_service.py: Business logic properly separated - RM assignment, commission calculation, stage validation
Stage validation rules working correctly (site_visit requires shortlist + requirements, negotiation requires availability, booking_confirmed requires full validation)
RM ownership check properly enforced - RM can only see/edit their assigned leads, Admin sees all
Commission lifecycle working: projected -> confirmed -> earned -> collected
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
All sub-resources (notes, follow-ups, communications, shortlist, quotes, planner-matches) properly linked to leads
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactor Phase 4 (Leads Routes Migration) complete. All 26 lead endpoints migrated from server.py to routes/leads.py with business logic in services/lead_service.py. Key endpoints tested: (1) Lead CRUD: POST/GET/PUT /api/leads (2) Stage Requirements: GET /api/leads/{id}/stage-requirements (3) Notes: POST/GET /api/leads/{id}/notes (4) Follow-ups: POST/PUT/GET /api/leads/{id}/follow-ups (5) Communications: POST/GET /api/leads/{id}/communications (6) Shortlist: POST/PUT/DELETE/GET /api/leads/{id}/shortlist (7) Quotes: POST/GET/PUT /api/leads/{id}/quotes (8) Planner Matches: POST/GET /api/leads/{id}/planner-matches (9) Admin: PUT /api/leads/{id}/reassign (10) Commission: PUT /api/leads/{id}/complete-event, commission-collected, GET commission-summary (11) Activity: GET /api/leads/{id}/activity. Previous phases verified: Phase 1 (auth, venues), Phase 2 (availability, holds), Phase 3 (comparison sheets). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_leads_routes_regression.py

phase4_leads_routes.desc: List leads (RM sees own, Admin sees all)
